name: Informatika A.D.
message: [AI generated] Informatika A.D. is an information technology and services company based in Belgrade, Serbia. It offers comprehensive IT solutions, including system integration, IT consulting, application development, and IT infrastructure solutions. The company caters to public administration, financial sector, healthcare, telecommunications, energy, utilities, and other sectors across Serbia and internationally. Informatika A.D. also provides IT outsourcing, cloud services, and digital transformation services.
